## Lao quality checklist

- [ ] All Lao text uses Lao Unicode block (U+0E80–U+0EFF), NOT Thai (U+0E00–U+0E7F)
- [ ] Tone marks only `່` and `້` for native Lao (no `໊` or `໋` unless loanword)
- [ ] Pronouns follow register rules — uses `ຂ້ອຍ`/`ເຈົ້າ` for conversation, never `ຂ້ານ້ອຍ`
- [ ] Future tense uses `ສິ` (not Thai `ຈະ`)
- [ ] Foreign words transliterated (ທັບສັບ) where appropriate
- [ ] No Thai vocabulary smuggled in (e.g., `ใคร`, `ขอบคุณ`, `ที่ไหน`)
